headline: Is It Too Late To Consider BlackRock (BLK) After Recent Share Price Strength?
summary: If you are wondering whether BlackRock at around US$1,081.90 is offering good value today, the key is to look closely at what different valuation methods are saying about the stock. The share price is roughly flat year to date with a slight decline of 0.3%, after a 2.8% gain over the past month and a 11.6% return over the last year. This may leave you questioning whether the recent moves still leave room for attractive long term returns or signal shifting risk perceptions. Over the past...
